task: Native NeoOLAF DocRED document-level relation extraction v5. Metadata guidance only; no gold entity inventory or relation pairs.

priority_relation_specs.label: country
priority_relation_specs.definition: sovereign state that this item is in (not to be used for human beings)

priority_relation_specs.label: country of citizenship
priority_relation_specs.definition: the object is a country that recognizes the subject as its citizen

priority_relation_specs.label: continent
priority_relation_specs.definition: continent of which the subject is a part

priority_relation_specs.label: instance of
priority_relation_specs.definition: type to which this subject corresponds/belongs. Different from P279 (subclass of); for example: K2 is an instance of mountain; volcanoes form a subclass of mountains, and the volcano is a type (instance) of volcanic landform

priority_relation_specs.label: educated at
priority_relation_specs.definition: educational institution attended by subject

priority_relation_specs.label: employer
priority_relation_specs.definition: person or organization for which the subject works or worked

priority_relation_specs.label: owned by
priority_relation_specs.definition: owner of the subject
priority_relation_specs.direction: owned entity/organization -> owner or owning group

priority_relation_specs.label: located in the administrative territorial entity
priority_relation_specs.definition: the item is located on the territory of the following administrative entity.

priority_relation_specs.label: contains the administrative territorial entity
priority_relation_specs.definition: (list of) direct subdivisions of an administrative territorial entity

priority_relation_specs.label: headquarters location
priority_relation_specs.definition: city or town where an organization's headquarters is or has been situated. Use P276 qualifier for specific building

priority_relation_specs.label: performer
priority_relation_specs.definition: actor, musician, band or other performer associated with this role or musical work

priority_relation_specs.label: record label
priority_relation_specs.definition: brand and trademark associated with the marketing of subject music recordings and music videos

priority_relation_specs.label: has subsidiary
priority_relation_specs.definition: subsidiary of a company or organization; generally a fully owned separate corporation.

priority_relation_specs.label: part of
priority_relation_specs.definition: object of which the subject is a part (if this subject is already part of object A which is a part of object B, then please only make the subject part of object A), inverse property of "has part"
priority_relation_specs.direction: part/item -> larger whole or series; use only when a more specific corporate property is not supported

priority_relation_specs.label: member of
priority_relation_specs.definition: organization, club or musical group to which the subject belongs.
priority_relation_specs.direction: person/organization -> organization or consortium of which it is a member

priority_relation_specs.label: has part(s)
priority_relation_specs.definition: part of this subject; inverse property of "part of" (P361). See also "has parts of the class" (P2670).

priority_relation_specs.label: date of birth
priority_relation_specs.definition: date on which the subject was born

priority_relation_specs.label: date of death
priority_relation_specs.definition: date on which the subject died

priority_relation_specs.label: inception
priority_relation_specs.definition: time when an entity begins to exist; for date of official opening use P1619

priority_relation_specs.label: publication date
priority_relation_specs.definition: date or point in time when a work was first published or released

priority_relation_specs.label: parent organization
priority_relation_specs.definition: parent organization of an organization, opposite of subsidiaries (P355)

layer01.goal: Extract exact endpoint nodes and one structured relation instance per independently supported pair.
layer01.explicit_relations: Extract direct statements from the article.
layer01.controlled_inference: Also allow high-confidence demonym, alias/coreference, “the country”, and common city-country containment links. Mark them inferred in justification.
layer01.separation_rule: A clause containing both a date and a location must yield two different relation instances.
layer01.do_not: Do not select P-IDs, do not emit topical phrases, do not merge pairs, and do not invent obscure geography.
layer01.country_coverage_check: Before returning, identify country anchors and verify every supported non-human ORG/LOC -> sovereign country pair has a separate relation instance.
layer01.country_subjects: Consider the main organization, named corporate/parent group, and named cities/locations. Use explicit text, demonyms, the-country coreference, or only very high-confidence city-country knowledge.
layer01.country_endpoint_normalization: Use a canonical country noun as endpoint when an unambiguous demonym is normalized. Explain that the relation is inferred.
layer01.country_predicate_contract: Use exactly one of: is in country; demonym implies country; the country refers to.

layer02.goal: For each structured relation instance, select exactly one canonical ontology property or found=false.
layer02.selection: Use source type, target type, direction, specificity, definition, domain and range.
layer02.specificity: Prefer P159 over P131 for an organization explicitly based/headquartered in a city; prefer P127/P749 over generic P361 in corporate ownership/parent contexts; use P571 for organization establishment/relaunch dates and P577 only for publication/release dates of creative works.
layer02.output_contract: controlled_relation:Pxxx : label; promote_to_ontology:true; preserve source_label and target_label hints.
layer02.compact_prompt: Use at most five ontology properties selected from ontology RAG plus predicate-specific candidates. Do not send the full relation inventory to the classifier.
layer02.corporate_guardrail: ORG part of a corporate/media group -> P127 owned by unless explicit subsidiary/branch/division/laboratory wording supports P749. P361 is fallback only.
layer02.organization_location_guardrail: ORG based/headquartered in city -> P159. For this DocRED profile, an organization launched/relaunched in its operating/base city also maps to P159 rather than generic P276/P131.
layer02.country_guardrail: Non-human ORG/LOC to sovereign country -> P17, never P27.

layer04.goal: Resolve the exact source and target candidates already named by Layer 1 and linked by Layer 2.
layer04.validation: Reject endpoint pairs that violate coarse DocRED types or ontology range, such as P577 to a location.
layer04.fallback: Use the native parallel Layer 4 LLM task only when exact endpoint labels cannot be resolved.
layer04.projection_note: Benchmark mention normalization occurs only after the native run and never changes native candidates or triples.

contrastive_rules.avoid: P131 administrative containment unless the statement is about territorial containment; P276 only for a generic event/object location.

contrastive_rules.context: ORG is part of a corporate/media group
contrastive_rules.prefer: P127 owned by or P749 parent organization when ownership/parent semantics are supported
contrastive_rules.avoid: P361 generic part of as the first choice.

contrastive_rules.context: ORG is a member of consortium/association
creative work was published/released on DATE
contrastive_rules.avoid: P571 unless the subject is the organization/event itself.

contrastive_rules.context: non-human entity/place belongs to sovereign country
contrastive_rules.avoid: P27 country of citizenship, which is for people.
P159 unless source is an organization and target is its headquarters/base.

relation_instance_examples.text: Northstar Television is based in Harbor City.
expressions: Northstar Television || is based in || Harbor City
relation_instance_examples.note: The relation instance is separate from endpoint expressions.

relation_instance_examples.text: Northstar Institute was established in June 2010 in Harbor City.
expressions: Northstar Institute || was established in || June 2010
Northstar Institute || was established in || Harbor City

relation_instance_examples.text: The broadcaster is a member of the Digital Networks Alliance.
expressions: The broadcaster || is a member of || Digital Networks Alliance

relation_instance_examples.text: Northstar Television is a Zetan broadcaster.
expressions: Northstar Television || Zetan demonym implies country || Republic Z
relation_instance_examples.note: Controlled inferred relation; mark inferred and explain the demonym.

relation_examples.text: Northstar Television is based in Harbor City.
relation_examples.explanation: Organization-to-base-city direction. Keep the exact entities and canonicalize the predicate to P159.

relation_examples.text: Harbor City is in Republic Z.
relation_examples.explanation: Use P17 for a non-human place/entity to its sovereign country.

relation_examples.text: Northstar Television is part of Northstar Media Group.
relation_examples.explanation: In a corporate/group context, test ownership or parent-organization semantics before generic P361.

relation_examples.text: Northstar Research Europe is a subsidiary of Northstar Research.
Northstar Research has subsidiary Northstar Research Europe.
The broadcaster is a member of the Digital Networks Alliance.
relation_examples.explanation: Membership is not ownership, parent organization, or generic part-of.

relation_examples.text: The institute was established in June 2010.
Alex Morgan studied at Central College.
The single was performed by Artist Q.
The single was released by Aurora Records.
Northstar Broadcasting was relaunched in Harbor City.
relation_examples.explanation: For this DocRED profile, an organization launch/relaunch city is treated as its base/headquarters location rather than generic event location.

relation_examples.text: Northstar Television is part of Northstar Media Group.
relation_examples.explanation: Corporate/media-group part-of wording maps to ownership; reserve P749 for explicit subsidiary/branch/unit wording.

inference_policy: Controlled document-level inference is allowed for explicit aliases/coreference, unambiguous demonyms, phrases such as “the country”, and very high-confidence city-country containment. Country propagation is performed in the single native Layer 1 call; no post-run closure creates relations.
anti_leakage: No gold entity clusters, gold relation pairs, or facts copied from this evaluation document are present in guidance.

country_propagation_examples.text: Northstar TV is a Zetan broadcaster based in Harbor City, Republic Z. It is part of Northstar Media Group, one of the largest media groups in the country.
expected_relation_instances: Northstar TV || demonym implies country || Republic Z
Harbor City || is in country || Republic Z
Northstar Media Group || the country refers to || Republic Z
country_propagation_examples.note: One country relation per supported non-human subject; all facts are contained in the synthetic sentence.

country_propagation_examples.text: Aster Institute opened in Paris and is a French research organization.
expected_relation_instances: Aster Institute || demonym implies country || France
country_propagation_examples.note: The city-country link is permitted because it is universally known and confidence is high.

relation_instance_examples_v5.text: Northstar Television is based in Harbor City.
expressions: Northstar Television || is based in || Harbor City
relation_instance_examples_v5.note: Exact endpoints plus one relation instance.

relation_instance_examples_v5.text: Northstar Institute was established in June 2010 in Harbor City.
expressions: Northstar Institute || was established on || June 2010
Northstar Institute || was established in || Harbor City
relation_instance_examples_v5.note: Temporal and locative pairs are separate.

relation_instance_examples_v5.text: Northstar Television is part of Northstar Media Group.
expressions: Northstar Television || is part of the corporate group || Northstar Media Group
relation_instance_examples_v5.note: Corporate group wording remains explicit so Layer 2 can distinguish P127 from P749/P361.

relation_instance_examples_v5.text: The broadcaster is a member of the Digital Networks Alliance.
expressions: The broadcaster || is a member of || Digital Networks Alliance
